item.yongye.health_skill_book.tooltip.ef: Permanently grants %s max health when learned
item.yongye.health_skill_book.tooltip.us: Right-click to learn / combine same level on a crafting table
item.yongye.skill_book.steal.desc: On hit, chance (scales with level) to steal the mob's held item
item.yongye.ward_book.desc: Right-click with a weapon in the other hand to make it immune to elite disarm
item.yongye.skill_book.satiety.desc: Continuously restores hunger; higher level = rarely hungry
item.yongye.skill_book.armor.desc: Increases armor and armor toughness (+0.5 armor / +0.25 toughness per level)
item.yongye.skill_book.regen.desc: Continuous healing (heals level x0.1 per second; disabled while healing is blocked)
item.yongye.skill_book.evasion.desc: Chance to fully dodge a hit (+1% per level, cap 50%)
item.yongye.skill_book.thorns.desc: Reflects damage back to attackers (x0.05 per level, cap x3)
item.yongye.skill_book.resistance.desc: Fire resistance + chance to clear negative effects (+1% clear chance per level, cap 80%)
message.yongye.learned_health: Learned Health V%1$s. Total: V%2$s (+%3$s max health)
item.yongye.artifact.bone_arrow_charm.de: Chance to negate/deflect arrows; counters elite skeletons
item.yongye.artifact.voodoo_bottle.desc: Clears and weakens negative effects; counters elite witches
item.yongye.artifact.gravedigger_compass: Points to nearby high-value targets (elite / boss)
item.yongye.artifact.undying_ember.desc: Cheats death on fatal damage (has cooldown)
item.yongye.artifact.nightfall_eye.desc: Night vision during nightfall; reduces being locked-on
item.yongye.artifact.world_anchor.desc: Reduces nearby mobs' digging and climbing
item.yongye.artifact.in_bag: Active while in your inventory; only the highest level of each counts
